title: santalum lanceolatum
intro: Santalum lanceolatum, also known as the Koa sandalwood or Koa sandalwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is native to Hawaii and has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Santalum lanceolatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used topically or ingested for its medicinal benefits.
